action.reasoning: Observation: Best PESQ=3.134 (MG+ baseline), all attempts to fine-tune MG+ generator failed due to pipeline issues. Generator is at model.mods.enhance_model but exact STFT pipeline is unclear. Analysis: Training a residual post-processing network on top of MG+ output avoids all pipeline issues. The network takes [MG+ enhanced, noisy] as dual input and predicts waveform corrections toward clean. Zero-initialized output ensures conservative start. MG+'s weak cbak (2.905) suggests room for improvement in noise removal. Decision: Write train_residual.py to cache MG+ enhanced audio, train ResidualTCN, and evaluate. Update predict.py for MG+ + residual pipeline. Target 15-20 epochs.
